user_query: My family and I are enthusiastic about NFTs. Can you assist us in retrieving the owned tokens for our wallet addresses 0x123456789 and 0x987654321? Additionally, we would like to generate random and unique usernames for our online profiles.

TaskList.description: Retrieve the owned NFT tokens for the wallet address 0x123456789.
Retrieve the owned NFT tokens for the wallet address 0x987654321.
Generate random and unique usernames for online profiles.
